'''zhodadaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:oathable|oathable]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-d-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oathable|oathable]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhodadaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodadithi|zhodadithi]] || [[word:zhodadiji|zhodadiji]] || [[word:zhodadishi|zhodadishi]] || [[word:zhodadiki|zhodadiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodaduthuthu|zhodaduthuthu]] || [[word:zhodadujuju|zhodadujuju]] || [[word:zhodadushushu|zhodadushushu]] || [[word:zhodadukuku|zhodadukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodaduthu|zhodaduthu]] || [[word:zhodaduju|zhodaduju]] || [[word:zhodadushu|zhodadushu]] || [[word:zhodaduku|zhodaduku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodadufthuf|zhodadufthuf]] || [[word:zhodadufjuf|zhodadufjuf]] || [[word:zhodadufshuf|zhodadufshuf]] || [[word:zhodadufkuf|zhodadufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodadethe|zhodadethe]] || [[word:zhodadeje|zhodadeje]] || [[word:zhodadeshe|zhodadeshe]] || [[word:zhodadeke|zhodadeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodadothotho|zhodadothotho]] || [[word:zhodadojojo|zhodadojojo]] || [[word:zhodadoshosho|zhodadoshosho]] || [[word:zhodadokoko|zhodadokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodadotho|zhodadotho]] || [[word:zhodadojo|zhodadojo]] || [[word:zhodadosho|zhodadosho]] || [[word:zhodadoko|zhodadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodadofthof|zhodadofthof]] || [[word:zhodadofjof|zhodadofjof]] || [[word:zhodadofshof|zhodadofshof]] || [[word:zhodadofkof|zhodadofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfthĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfjĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfshĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhodadĂŻfkĂŻf|zhodadĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhodadĂŠthĂŠ|zhodadĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodadĂŠjĂŠ|zhodadĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodadĂŠshĂŠ|zhodadĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhodadĂŠkĂŠ|zhodadĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhodadathatha|zhodadathatha]] || [[word:zhodadajaja|zhodadajaja]] || [[word:zhodadashasha|zhodadashasha]] || [[word:zhodadakaka|zhodadakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhodadatha|zhodadatha]] || [[word:zhodadaja|zhodadaja]] || [[word:zhodadasha|zhodadasha]] || [[word:zhodadaka|zhodadaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhodadafthaf|zhodadafthaf]] || [[word:zhodadafjaf|zhodadafjaf]] || [[word:zhodadafshaf|zhodadafshaf]] || [[word:zhodadafkaf|zhodadafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhodadasha|zhodadasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodadshĂ«sha|zhodadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodadrosha|zhodadrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodadmusha|zhodadmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodadyasha|zhodadyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodadnkshĂ«sha|gozhodadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodadnkrosha|gozhodadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodadnkmusha|gozhodadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodadnkyasha|gozhodadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhodadadasha|zhodadadasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodadadshĂ«sha|zhodadadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodadadrosha|zhodadadrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodadadmusha|zhodadadmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodadadyasha|zhodadadyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodadadnkshĂ«sha|gozhodadadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodadadnkrosha|gozhodadadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodadadnkmusha|gozhodadadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodadadnkyasha|gozhodadadnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhedĂŠdasha|zhedĂŠdasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhedĂŠdshĂ«sha|zhedĂŠdshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhedĂŠdrosha|zhedĂŠdrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhedĂŠdmusha|zhedĂŠdmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhedĂŠdyasha|zhedĂŠdyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhedĂŠdnkshĂ«sha|gozhedĂŠdnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhedĂŠdnkrosha|gozhedĂŠdnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhedĂŠdnkmusha|gozhedĂŠdnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhedĂŠdnkyasha|gozhedĂŠdnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhodfadasha|zhodfadasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhodfadshĂ«sha|zhodfadshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhodfadrosha|zhodfadrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhodfadmusha|zhodfadmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhodfadyasha|zhodfadyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhodfadnkshĂ«sha|gozhodfadnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhodfadnkrosha|gozhodfadnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhodfadnkmusha|gozhodfadnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhodfadnkyasha|gozhodfadnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
